plugins.name: @dune/plugin-inline-edit
plugins.label: Inline Edit
plugins.description: Y.js-backed real-time inline content editing (TipTap WYSIWYG) with an admin bar. Edit pages directly on the front end with collaborative cursors.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-pdf
plugins.label: PDF
plugins.description: Serve PDF files with an in-browser viewer and index their extracted text into search. Drops PDFs into your site as searchable, viewable pages.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-meilisearch
plugins.label: Meilisearch
plugins.description: Drop-in replacement for the built-in search engine that uses Meilisearch for fast, typo-tolerant full-text search with faceted filtering.
plugins.author: Dune Team
